name: polyglot-learning-os
description: An original router-led skill set for goal-driven multilingual study.

interface.longDescription: Polyglot Learning OS coordinates level checks, roadmaps, grammar, vocabulary review, reading input, conversation, writing, study notes, tests, progress analysis, and durable learning memory through one central router.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $polyglot-router to help me reach my target language level by my deadline.
